channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hawaii Justices’ Inflammatory Attack on the U.S. Supreme Court
item.description: The state supreme court’s rhetoric could fuel the view that judging is just politics by another name.

item.title: Trump and Ocasio-Cortez clash over communism as DSA gains influence in Democratic Party
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez responded Wednesday to GOP claims that democratic socialists are pushing a communist agenda in Congress.

item.title: The End of 'El Mayo' Is Only the Beginning
item.description: The lenient treatment of the cartel leader may indicate he will share information about Mexico's corrupt political elite.

item.title: Large-Scale Desalination Could Help Offset Colorado River Water Shortage
item.description: The federal government has options for overcoming political resistance in California.
